news.Title: Apple asks US Supreme Court to review contempt order in Epic Games lawsuit
news.Content:
By Mike Scarcella

WASHINGTON, May 21 (Reuters) - Apple asked the U.S. Supreme Court on Thursday to review a lower court ruling that held the iPhone maker in ‌civil contempt over fees it was charging on some outside purchases made by customers ‌of its App Store.

The petition to the Supreme Court escalates a years-long legal battle with “Fortnite” video game maker Epic ​Games, which sued Apple in 2020 seeking to loosen its control over transactions in applications that use the company's iOS operating system and its restrictions on how apps are distributed to consumers.

More from Yahoo Scout

How did the Epic Games lawsuit impact Apple?

What is Apple's 27% commission controversy?

What is Apple's Supreme Court petition about?

What are the next steps in this legal battle?

A judge mostly dismissed Epic's lawsuit but issued an injunction in 2021 requiring Apple to let developers include ‌links in their apps directing ⁠users to non-Apple payment methods.

Apple allowed the links but adopted new restrictions, including a 27% commission on developers for purchases made on payment systems outside ⁠the App Store within seven days of clicking a link.

Epic argued that the new 27% commission flouted the earlier injunction. In 2025, the judge found Apple in civil contempt for violating the injunction.

Apple ​urged ​the justices on Thursday to take up two legal ​issues. It said the injunction should ‌not apply to millions of developers, since Epic is the only plaintiff and the case is not a class action. Apple also contends it cannot be held in contempt for allegedly violating the "spirit" of an injunction that did not explicitly prohibit the conduct in question.

Apple has denied any wrongdoing and says it is complying with court orders.

Epic Games in a statement on ‌Thursday called Apple's Supreme Court challenge to the contempt ​order "one last Hail Mary to delay a conclusion to ​this case and avoid opening up the ​gates to payment competition for the benefit of consumers.”

The 9th U.S. Circuit ‌Court of Appeals in December upheld the ​contempt finding but said ​Apple could make new arguments in the trial court about what commission it should be allowed to charge for digital goods bought in apps distributed through the App Store ​but paid for using third-party ‌payment systems.

The Supreme Court earlier in May turned down Apple's earlier bid to ​pause proceedings in the lower court while its appeal plays out.

(Reporting by Mike ​Scarcella; Editing by David Bario and Bill Berkrot)

news.Title: Main Street can now bet on OpenAl, SpaceX through Polymarket
news.Content:
The biggest financial story of the last decade is not what is happening on Wall Street . It is what is happening just outside of it.

The most valuable companies of this generation, the ones running cloud infrastructure, satellite internet, rocket launches and a sizable chunk of artificial intelligence research, have spent years deliberately staying private. They have raised tens of billions of dollars without ever filing an S-1.

For most working Americans, that has been a closed loop. You can buy Tesla ( TSLA ) stock through your brokerage account today. You cannot buy SpaceX stock, no matter how much your retirement portfolio screams at you to.

You can buy Microsoft ( MSFT ). You cannot directly buy a piece of OpenAI, even though Microsoft owns part of it. The richest companies in the most consequential industries have built a velvet rope, and most of us have been standing on the wrong side of it.

That fence just got a small but real crack in it. On May 19, prediction markets platform Polymarket announced something that almost feels like an answer to that long-running complaint.

What Polymarket actually launched

Polymarket is opening event contracts tied to the performance and milestones of private companies, including OpenAI, Anthropic, SpaceX, Anduril, Stripe, Databricks and Ripple.

The platform is doing this through an exclusive deal with Nasdaq Private Market, a subsidiary of Nasdaq Inc. (NDAQ) that already runs secondary share trading and tender offers for late-stage startups. Nasdaq Private Market will serve as the resolution data provider, meaning it decides whether a contract pays out "yes" or "no."

More Wall Street:

JPMorgan resets S&P 500 price target for the rest of 2026

Vanguard challenges the S&P 500 as a one-stop strategy

Goldman Sachs resets Broadcom stock forecast

A user can already trade a contract on whether OpenAI surpasses a $1 trillion valuation by the end of 2026, reported Crypto Briefing citing the Financial Times. These are not stock purchases. They are binary bets, priced between zero and $1, that settle to fixed payouts based on outcome.

"For the first time, anyone can engage with the outcomes driving value at the world's most consequential private companies," said Polymarket CEO Shayne Coplan in the launch announcement, reported CBS News .

The pitch lands at a number that is hard to ignore.

Key figures behind the launch:

About 1,600 unicorns globally now hold more than $5 trillion in combined value, according to Polymarket .

Polymarket and rival Kalshi handled more than $24 billion in notional volume in April, per Dune Analytics data cited by CNBC .

SpaceX is eyeing a public valuation as high as $1.75 trillion in a future offering, reported CoinGape .

Story Continues

Related: Prediction markets like Kalshi are monetizing reality & the gaming industry is pushing back

Why NYSE owner ICE bet $1.6 billion on this market

Polymarket is not building this alone. Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), the parent company of the New York Stock Exchange , has sunk roughly $1.6 billion into the platform across two direct cash investments, with up to $40 million more in secondary purchases on the way, according to Intercontinental Exchange .

That is not money the NYSE's parent allocates to a sideshow. In my analysis, ICE has now committed more capital to Polymarket than the market cap of plenty of mid-sized regional banks in this country.

The strategic logic gets clearer once you read the funding numbers around it. Polymarket's main competitor, Kalshi, recently raised over $1 billion at a $22 billion valuation, reported CoinDesk .

Prediction markets are no longer a niche of academic curiosity. They are turning into a parallel market for sentiment, and Wall Street's biggest exchange operator wants the rails.

What makes today's launch different is that the contracts are no longer just about elections or playoff games. They are about the same companies already driving much of the public-market AI trade through their suppliers, customers and capital partners.

Where analysts land on retail prediction market trading

Not everyone is celebrating. Prediction markets are "retail's shiny new toy," wrote a team of Barclays analysts in a recent research note, according to CNBC .

The same note observed that most current activity is concentrated in sports and political outcomes, not financial events. That mix is shifting quickly, and the shift is what attracts people like Jeff Kilburg, founder and chief executive of KKM Financial.

Prediction markets are "taking the spotlight now because [they are] accessible," Kilburg told CNBC , pointing to their binary outcomes and the wide menu of available events.

Accessibility is also where the danger lives. Charles Schwab ( SCHW ) CEO Richard Wurster told analysts on a recent earnings call that the firm is steering clients away from contracts tied to "sports, politics, pop culture," with a clear preference for financial event contracts, reported InvestmentNews .

That distinction matters for any TheStreet reader thinking about clicking buy. A contract asking whether OpenAI crosses $1 trillion in valuation by year-end 2026 looks like a derivative. It behaves like a binary option. It pays like a coin flip.

It does not give you a share of OpenAI. If the company is acquired, restructures or quietly pushes its IPO another year out, that contract can lose value fast.

Settlement risk and source-integrity risk on event contracts have both been flagged as growing concerns, according to Baker McKenzie .

What Main Street should watch on private company contracts

My read on this launch is that it is less about democratizing access and more about what comes next. ICE wants the data. Nasdaq wants the resolution business. Polymarket wants the volume. You are the volume.

Three things worth watching from here.

The CFTC has been signaling closer attention to event contracts, particularly around source integrity and contract interpretation, according to the CFTC itself.

Robinhood ( HOOD ) has already started leaning into regulated prediction markets through partners like Kalshi, reported Yahoo Finance . If more brokers follow, these contracts stop being a niche tab in a crypto wallet and start showing up next to "stocks" and "options" in your retail app.

And then there is SpaceX. If Elon Musk 's rocket company files for what could be the largest IPO in market history, every prediction contract priced ahead of that moment becomes a public record of who saw it coming.

For my money, that one IPO is the cleanest test of whether private-company prediction markets are real price-discovery infrastructure or just a louder casino with better branding.

Either way, Main Street investors now have a way to put dollars behind their guesses on companies that previously did not return their calls.

Related: How prediction apps like Polymarket are redefining gambling

This story was originally published by TheStreet on May 21, 2026, where it first appeared in the Investing section. Add TheStreet as a Preferred Source by clicking here.

news.Title: Amazon.com Shareholders Back Board as Jassy Touts AI, AWS Growth at Annual Meeting
news.Content:
Key Points

Interested in Amazon.com, Inc.? Here are five stocks we like better.

Amazon shareholders approved the board’s director nominees , ratified Ernst & Young as auditor for fiscal 2026 and backed executive pay, while none of the shareholder proposals passed .

CEO Andy Jassy emphasized Amazon’s AI and AWS momentum , saying AWS revenue grew 28% in Q1 2026 to a $150 billion run rate and that AWS AI revenue exceeded $15 billion on an annualized basis.

CFO Brian Olsavsky said Amazon’s 2025 sales rose 12% to $716.9 billion , with AWS sales up 20% to $129 billion, but free cash flow fell sharply as the company boosted capital spending on data centers, chips and other AI infrastructure.

The Palantir Paradox—Record Numbers and a Stock That Won't Cooperate

Amazon.com (NASDAQ:AMZN) shareholders approved the company’s director nominees, ratified Ernst & Young as independent auditor for fiscal 2026 and backed the company’s executive compensation plan at the company’s annual meeting, according to preliminary voting results announced during the meeting.

Susan Xiong, Amazon’s vice president, associate general counsel and corporate secretary, said each director nominee received a majority of votes cast. She also said none of the shareholder proposals received the required vote for approval.

Shareholder Proposals Rejected

→ Vertical Aerospace: Pre-Flight Checks Point to a Breakout

Ackman and Berkshire Are Betting Against Each Other on AI

Shareholders considered several proposals during the formal portion of the meeting, including requests for additional reporting on charitable partnerships, data centers and climate commitments, and the adoption of an independent board chair policy.

Stefan Padfield, a principal at the Free Enterprise Initiative, part of The Heritage Foundation, presented a proposal requesting a report on risks related to Amazon’s use of diagnostic tools created by corporate partners, particularly the Southern Poverty Law Center. Padfield criticized the board’s opposition statement and said The Heritage Foundation remained committed to engagement with Amazon.

→ The Pentagon's AI Pivot Supercharges Defense Stocks

Why Trump’s Amazon Stock Sale May Not Matter at All

Kelly Poole presented a proposal requesting additional reporting on how Amazon plans to meet climate commitments while expanding data centers to support artificial intelligence. Poole said Amazon’s data center growth could increase pressure on power grids and fossil fuel use, and cited a nearly 40% rise in emissions from electricity between 2022 and 2024.

Story Continues

Paul Chesser of the National Legal and Policy Center introduced a proposal seeking a report on the impact and cost of Amazon’s climate commitments. Chesser pointed to rising capital expenditures tied to AI and data center infrastructure and said shareholders should receive more information about the cost of The Climate Pledge.

→ Ackman and Berkshire Are Betting Against Each Other on AI

Brandon Rees, speaking on behalf of the AFL-CIO Reserve Fund, urged the board to adopt a mandatory independent board chair policy. Rees said an independent chair would strengthen board oversight, citing Jeff Bezos’ ownership of other businesses that have contracts or potential business relationships with Amazon.

Joan Morris, a warehouse associate at Amazon’s ATL6 facility in East Point, Georgia, presented a non-binding floor proposal asking Amazon to establish an AI and automation advisory council made up primarily of hourly associates and frontline workers. Morris said workers need more transparency about how AI and robotics are being deployed. Amazon recommended shareholders vote against the proposal.

Olsavsky Highlights 2025 Financial Results

Chief Financial Officer Brian Olsavsky said Amazon’s 2025 worldwide net sales rose 12% year over year to $716.9 billion. North America sales grew 10% to $426.3 billion, while international segment sales rose 10% excluding foreign exchange effects to $161.9 billion. AWS sales grew 20% to $129 billion.

Olsavsky said Amazon’s full-year worldwide operating income increased to $80 billion from $68.6 billion in 2024. He attributed the gain to accelerating revenue growth, lower per-unit cost to serve in the stores business and slower growth in fixed costs relative to revenue.

Amazon invested $128.3 billion in cash capital expenditures in 2025, Olsavsky said, primarily driven by AWS investments to support generative AI, core cloud services and technology infrastructure such as data centers, chips and servers. Operating cash flow rose $24 billion year over year to $140 billion, while free cash flow declined to $11 billion from $38 billion in 2024, largely due to higher capital spending.

In Amazon’s stores business, Olsavsky said the company delivered more than 13 billion units to Prime members the same day or next day globally in 2025. He also said same-day perishable grocery delivery became available in more than 2,300 U.S. cities and towns, and that Everyday Essentials grew nearly twice as fast as other U.S. categories.

Jassy Points to AI and AWS Growth

Chief Executive Officer Andy Jassy said 2025 was a strong year for Amazon and that momentum continued into 2026. He said AWS grew 28% year over year in the first quarter of 2026, reaching a $150 billion revenue run rate, its fastest growth rate in 15 quarters.

Jassy said AWS’ AI revenue run rate exceeded $15 billion in the first quarter of 2026. He said customers are choosing AWS for generative AI because of its range of AI services, proximity to enterprise data and applications, core infrastructure offerings, and security and operating performance.

Jassy also highlighted Amazon’s custom chip business, saying it had a $20 billion annual revenue run rate through the first quarter of 2026 and was growing at triple-digit percentages year over year. He said Amazon had more than $225 billion in future revenue commitments for Trainium and that Trainium2 was “largely sold out,” while Trainium3 was also “largely sold out.”

Asked about a potential dividend, Jassy said Amazon continues to evaluate uses of cash but believes the best long-term use of available cash is investing in early-stage opportunities, including AI, AWS, retail infrastructure and Amazon Leo, the company’s low Earth orbit satellite constellation.

Retail, Safety and Prime Video Discussed

Jassy said Amazon’s retail business is seeing innovation beyond delivery speed, including Alexa for Shopping, image-based search through Lens, AI-generated product discussions and apparel sizing technology. He said Alexa for Shopping monthly users were up 115% year over year in March, with engagement up nearly 400%.

In response to a question about job rotation in fulfillment operations, Jassy said the practice is intended to reduce musculoskeletal injuries by limiting repetitive motions and ergonomic stress. He said Amazon’s global recordable incident rate was down 14% year over year and 43% over six years, while its global lost time incident rate was down 14% year over year and 70% over six years.

Jassy also said Amazon Leo had more than 300 satellites in space, with 20 additional launches planned this year and 30 next year. He said customers signed up for Leo include Delta Air Lines, JetBlue, AT&T, Vodafone, DIRECTV Latin America and others.

On Prime Video, Jassy said the business is growing, profitable and still early in its potential. He cited film and television content, live sports, and partnerships with third-party content providers as drivers of engagement.

About Amazon.com (NASDAQ:AMZN)

Amazon.com, Inc is a diversified technology and retail company best known for its e-commerce marketplace and broad portfolio of consumer and enterprise services. Founded by Jeff Bezos in 1994 and headquartered in Seattle, Washington, the company launched as an online bookseller and expanded into a global retail platform that sells products directly to consumers and provides a marketplace for third-party sellers. Over time Amazon has grown beyond retail into areas including cloud computing, digital media, devices and logistics.

Key businesses and offerings include Amazon's online marketplace and fulfillment services, the Amazon Prime membership program (which bundles expedited shipping with streaming and other benefits), Amazon Web Services (AWS) which supplies on-demand cloud computing and storage to businesses and public-sector customers, and a range of content and advertising services such as Prime Video and Amazon Advertising.

He lifted his price targets for Micron to $800 from $740 , STMicro to $68 from $56 , and Texas Instruments to $300 from $255 . Rakesh’s thesis boils down to three key ideas: AI servers are becoming more power-intensive, increasing semiconductor content per system. Lead times and pricing are improving ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Mizuho analyst Vijay Rakesh upgraded price targets for Micron Technology (MU), STMicroelectronics (STMPA), and Texas Instruments (TXN), citing durable AI data center tailwinds.
• Price targets were raised for MU to $800, STMicro to $68, and TXN to $300, reflecting increased semiconductor content per system due to power-intensive AI servers.
• Texas Instruments (TXN) reported $4.8 billion in revenue, with industrial revenue up over 30% YoY and data-center revenue up about 90% YoY.
• TXN's Q2 revenue guidance is $5.0-$5.4 billion, indicating continued momentum, and its free cash flow recovered to $4.4 billion.
• Inventory normalization and improved service levels at TXN support a cleaner analog recovery and pricing discipline.
news.Keywords: AI data center demand, analog chips, memory market, price target upgrade, free cash flow

news.Title: SoftBank Group Soars on Nvidia AI Boost
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . SoftBank Group ( SFTBY , Financials ) surged after Nvidias strong ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SoftBank Group (SFTBY) shares surged 19.8%, adding $35 billion to its market value, following Nvidia's strong earnings report.
• Nvidia's revenue increased 85% year-over-year to $81.62 billion, boosting investor confidence in AI-related companies.

news.Title: NVIDIA Q1 Earnings Beat on Blackwell Ramp-Up, Data Center Strength
news.Content: NVIDIA Corporation NVDA delivered a strong first-quarter fiscal 2027 report, with results topping expectations on continued AI infrastructure demand. The company reported non-GAAP earnings of $1.87 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 5.65%. Non-GAAP earnings per share grew 140% year over year and 18% sequentially. Revenues surged 85% year over year and 20% sequentially to $81.62 billion and surpassed the consensus mark by 3.63%. A standout metric was Data Center market platform performance, which continued to report strong growth, reflecting broad-based AI infrastructure buildouts across hyperscale and an expanding mix of enterprise, industrial ...
news.AI_Summary:
• NVIDIA (NVDA) reported Q1 fiscal 2027 non-GAAP earnings of $1.87 per share and revenue of $81.62 billion, beating expectations.
• Data Center revenues surged 92% year-over-year to $75.25 billion, driven by Blackwell ramp-up and networking strength, with Hyperscale up 115% YoY and ACIE up 74% YoY.
• NVIDIA's customer mix is broadening beyond hyperscalers, with growth in AI clouds, enterprise, and sovereign initiatives.
• Non-GAAP gross margin was robust at 75%, reflecting a positive mix of Blackwell systems and lower inventory provisions.
• The company's balance sheet shows strong supply positioning with days sales outstanding at 45 days.
news.Keywords: NVIDIA earnings, data center revenue, AI infrastructure, Blackwell ramp-up, gross margin

news.Content: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX) (SPY) today is down -0.44%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI) (DIA) is down -0.47%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX) (QQQ) is down -0.49%. news.Title: Navitas vs onsemi: Which Stock Wins the AI Power Infrastructure Race?
news.Content:
As artificial intelligence (AI) is reshaping data center infrastructure, power semiconductors have emerged as one of the market’s hottest battlegrounds. That has pushed shares of ON Semiconductor ON and Navitas Semiconductor NVTS sharply higher, with the latter soaring 222% year to date and the former gaining 103.5%.

Both companies are riding the trend toward higher-voltage, energy-efficient AI power architectures. Their gallium nitride (GaN) and silicon carbide (SiC) chips help deliver faster switching speeds, lower heat and better power efficiency than traditional silicon solutions.

But while onsemi is a profitable industry heavyweight (with a market cap of roughly $43 billion), Navitas (with a market cap of just over $5 billion) is an emerging growth story. So, which stock offers the better AI infrastructure opportunity today? Let’s break it down.

Image Source: Zacks Investment Research

The Case for Navitas

Navitas has quickly become one of the market’s most aggressive AI power infrastructure plays. The company is benefiting from rising demand for next-generation data centers and grid upgrades as AI workloads require far more efficient power delivery systems. In the first quarter of 2026, Navitas’ combined AI infrastructure business grew 50% sequentially. Management believes the opportunity is still in the early innings, with the AI data center market alone representing a potential $1.4 billion to $2.5 billion serviceable market by 2030.

Navitas is also strengthening its position through new AI-focused products, including a 20 kW 800V-to-6V GaNFast power delivery board for AI data centers and a 250-kW solid-state transformer solution aimed at next-generation grid infrastructure. The company also expanded its fifth-generation 1200V SiC MOSFET lineup with compact packages designed for higher-density AI power systems.

One of the biggest catalysts for the stock is its relationship with NVIDIA. Last year, Navitas was selected as a power semiconductor partner for NVIDIA’s next-generation 800V HVDC data center architecture and recently showcased its 800V-to-6V DC-DC power delivery board at NVIDIA GTC. That gives Navitas valuable credibility in one of the fastest-growing areas of semiconductor spending.

At the same time, the company is reshaping its business mix. Navitas is moving away from lower-margin mobile and consumer markets and focusing more heavily on industrial and AI-driven applications.

Still, the risks remain substantial. Navitas is operating at a very small scale, generating just $8.6 million in first-quarter revenues, with second-quarter guidance pointing to only around $10 million in sales. The company is also deeply unprofitable, and management suggested it may need quarterly revenues in the high-$30 million range before reaching operating profitability. That leaves little room for execution mistakes, especially if AI infrastructure spending cools or customer deployments take longer than expected.

Story Continues

The Case for onsemi

onsemi brings something many investors value even more in today’s market — scale, profitability and proven execution. The company has steadily repositioned itself from a broad commodity-chip supplier into a focused power and sensing semiconductor player serving high-growth markets such as EVs, industrial automation, energy infrastructure and AI data centers. That shift is now helping ON gain traction in AI power systems, where demand is rising for efficient power-management chips used across hyperscale data centers, AI servers and next-generation power architectures.

ON’s AI data-center revenues jumped more than 30% sequentially in the first quarter and are expected to double year over year in 2026. Growth is being driven by programs spanning uninterruptible power supplies, intermediate bus conversion and backup power systems. The company also noted engagements with major hyperscalers and multiple XPU vendors, reinforcing confidence that it is becoming deeply embedded in the AI infrastructure ecosystem.

onsemi is also scaling its AI-specific portfolio aggressively through its Treo platform. The company doubled the number of AI data center products sampled year over year in 2025. ON has expanded its design funnel to more than $1.5 billion. onsemi’s acquisition of VCore assets has strengthened its AI data-center offerings. Like Navitas, ON participates across multiple stages of data-center power conversion. The difference is that ON is already doing it at a meaningful scale with established customers.

Profitability is another major advantage. Gross margin expanded for the third consecutive quarter to 38.5% in the first-quarter of 2026. Management expects margins to improve further through 2026 as factory utilization rises, manufacturing efficiencies improve and higher-margin products become a larger part of the revenue mix.

While automotive and industrial markets still dominate onsemi’s revenues, it offers diversification that reduces dependence on the AI infrastructure cycle or the pace of adoption. onsemi has established businesses that provide stability and cash flow even if AI spending slows.

Valuation Check: onsemi vs. Navitas

Navitas trades at an extremely rich forward price-to-sales multiple of roughly 98, suggesting investors are already pricing in years of aggressive AI-driven growth. That leaves little room for execution missteps and makes the stock highly sensitive to any slowdown in AI infrastructure spending or delays in customer ramps.

onsemi, by comparison, trades at a far more reasonable price-to-sales ratio of around 6.4. While ON may not deliver the same explosive upside as Navitas in a best-case AI scenario, its valuation looks far easier to justify given the profitability, scale, and diversified revenue base.

Our Take

Navitas is undeniably an exciting AI infrastructure story. Its NVIDIA partnership is meaningful and the long-term opportunity in 800V HVDC architectures could be massive. But the stock already prices in years of near-perfect execution. Trading at roughly 98 times forward sales with less than $50 million in annual revenues, Navitas is a highly speculative bet where even small execution missteps could trigger sharp downside. After its enormous rally, NVTS looks more like a sell. Navitas carries a Zacks Rank #4 (Sell).

onsemi, by contrast, is delivering well. AI data-center revenues are accelerating, margins are expanding and the company has the scale, profitability and customer relationships to benefit from AI power demand without depending on a single architectural shift. onsemi offers the growth, technology, sustainable execution and financial resilience needed to compound through a volatile AI infrastructure cycle. For long-term investors, onsemi remains the clear buy. ON stock currently carries a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

You can see the complete list of today’s Zacks #1 Rank (Strong Buy) stocks here .

news.Title: Are Computer and Technology Stocks Lagging  Applied Materials (AMAT) This Year?
news.Content:
Investors interested in Computer and Technology stocks should always be looking to find the best-performing companies in the group. Has Applied Materials (AMAT) been one of those stocks this year? A quick glance at the company's year-to-date performance in comparison to the rest of the Computer and Technology sector should help us answer this question.

Applied Materials is one of 594 companies in the Computer and Technology group. The Computer and Technology group currently sits at #2 within the Zacks Sector Rank. The Zacks Sector Rank considers 16 different sector groups. The average Zacks Rank of the individual stocks within the groups is measured, and the sectors are listed from best to worst.

The Zacks Rank is a proven system that emphasizes earnings estimates and estimate revisions, highlighting a variety of stocks that are displaying the right characteristics to beat the market over the next one to three months. Applied Materials is currently sporting a Zacks Rank of #2 (Buy).

Over the past three months, the Zacks Consensus Estimate for AMAT's full-year earnings has moved 8.2% higher. This means that analyst sentiment is stronger and the stock's earnings outlook is improving.

Based on the most recent data, AMAT has returned 66.1% so far this year. Meanwhile, stocks in the Computer and Technology group have gained about 16.6% on average. This shows that Applied Materials is outperforming its peers so far this year.

One other Computer and Technology stock that has outperformed the sector so far this year is Chegg (CHGG). The stock is up 31.2% year-to-date.

Over the past three months, Chegg's consensus EPS estimate for the current year has increased 29%. The stock currently has a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

Looking more specifically, Applied Materials belongs to the Electronics - Semiconductors industry, a group that includes 47 individual stocks and currently sits at #53 in the Zacks Industry Rank. Stocks in this group have gained about 40.6% so far this year, so AMAT is performing better this group in terms of year-to-date returns.

Chegg, however, belongs to the Internet - Software industry. Currently, this 170-stock industry is ranked #74. The industry has moved -13.2% so far this year.

Investors with an interest in Computer and Technology stocks should continue to track Applied Materials and Chegg. These stocks will be looking to continue their solid performance.

news.Title: Lam Research (LRCX) Just Overtook the 20-Day Moving Average
news.Content:
Lam Research (LRCX) is looking like an interesting pick from a technical perspective, as the company reached a key level of support. Recently, LRCX crossed above the 20-day moving average, suggesting a short-term bullish trend.

The 20-day simple moving average is a well-liked trading tool because it provides a look back at a stock's price over a 20-day period. Additionally, short-term traders find this SMA very beneficial, as it smooths out short-term price trends and shows more trend reversal signals than longer-term moving averages.

Like other SMAs, if a stock's price is moving above the 20-day, the trend is considered positive. When the price falls below the moving average, it can signal a downward trend.

Shares of LRCX have been moving higher over the past four weeks, up 10%. Plus, the company is currently a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) stock, suggesting that LRCX could be poised for a continued surge.

The bullish case only gets stronger once investors take into account LRCX's positive earnings estimate revisions. There have been 12 revisions higher for the current fiscal year compared to none lower, and the consensus estimate has moved up as well.

Given this move in earnings estimate revisions and the positive technical factor, investors may want to keep their eye on LRCX for more gains in the near future.

news.Title: AI Factory Partnership With Rebellions Sends Credo's Shares Up 8%
news.Content:
Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd CRDO shares surged 8.3% in trading yesterday and closed at $182.98. The catalyst behind the rally was Credo’s collaboration with Rebellions. By integrating Credo’s ZeroFlap active electrical cables (AECs) into Rebellions’ RebelPOD AI infrastructure platform, the two companies aim to deliver scalable, turnkey AI factories optimized for enterprise inference workloads.

In high-utilization clusters, brief instability can interrupt data flows, reduce GPU efficiency and force administrators into time-consuming troubleshooting cycles. Credo’s ZeroFlap AEC technology is designed specifically to eliminate these intermittent disruptions. AECs are engineered to provide stable high-speed connectivity, reduce signal integrity issues, enable plug-and-play deployment, lower maintenance complexity and improve operational uptime. By integrating these cables into the RebelPOD architecture, Rebellions can offer enterprises AI infrastructure with greater resilience and predictability.

The collaboration strengthens Credo’s position within the AI inference market. Rebellions is developing AI accelerators focused on inference workloads rather than training. Inference, the process of running AI models in production environments, is expected to become one of the fastest-growing segments of the AI semiconductor market. By integrating Credo’s connectivity solutions into Rebellions’ production-ready AI infrastructure stack, the partnership creates a more comprehensive offering for enterprises seeking scalable AI deployments. This also expands Credo’s exposure beyond traditional hyperscale customers and into enterprise AI markets.

The 8% stock gain suggests that investors believe the partnership could accelerate Credo’s revenue growth opportunities in AI infrastructure. CRDO has already benefited from surging demand for AI networking solutions, particularly among hyperscale cloud providers. Strategic alliances like this could diversify its customer base while deepening its exposure to enterprise AI deployments.

How Does CRDO Stack Up Against Major Semiconductor Giants?

Broadcom AVGO is experiencing strong momentum fueled by growth in AI semiconductors and continued success with its VMware integration. Strong demand for its networking products and custom AI accelerators augurs well. Its AI segment benefits from custom accelerators and advanced networking technology that support large-scale AI deployments with improved performance and efficiency. In April, Broadcom expanded its partnership with Google Cloud to deliver AI-powered network observability solutions and entered a multi-year strategic alliance with Meta to scale next-generation AI infrastructure, reinforcing its position in cloud networking and AI compute. AI networking is expected to accelerate in the fiscal second quarter and grow to 40% of total AI revenues.

Story Continues

Marvell Technology MRVL is benefiting from the strong demand environment across the data center end market. Its data center end market is gaining from AI-driven demand for custom XPU silicon. Marvell is solidifying its leadership in AI interconnect and optical technologies, a critical backbone of next-generation data centers. In fiscal 2026, it began volume shipments of 200G per lane 1.6T PAM4 DSPs and ramped up its 51.2 Tbps switches while continuing strong demand for its 800G PAM DSPs. Management expects its electro-optics portfolio to deliver strong growth in the near term, reflecting unmatched positioning in AI interconnect. Expanded partnership with NVIDIA significantly strengthens Marvell’s long-term growth outlook by embedding it deeper into the fast-growing AI infrastructure ecosystem.

CRDO Price Performance, Valuation and Estimates

Shares of CRDO are up 47.5% in the past three months compared with the Electronics-Semiconductors industry’s growth of 33.5%.

Image Source: Zacks Investment Research

Regarding the forward 12-month price/sales ratio, CRDO is trading at 16.69, higher than the industry’s multiple of 9.33.

The Zacks Consensus Estimate for CRDO earnings for fiscal 2026 has remained unchanged over the past 60 days.

CRDO currently carries a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy). You can see the complete list of today’s Zacks #1 Rank stocks here.

news.Content:

We’re late, we’re late, we’re late. 51 times earnings does not make it for me, even if it’s a good company.

Stock market data. Photo by Burak The Weekender on Pexels

It’s cheap. It’s good. Now, people say it’s cheap. What do you mean?… like 40 times earnings versus the others with growth? It’s actually okay. I would be a buyer of STMicro.

While we acknowledge the potential of STM as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. news.Title: Marvell Technology, Inc. (MRVL) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
news.Content:
Marvell Technology (MRVL) has recently been on Zacks.com's list of the most searched stocks. Therefore, you might want to consider some of the key factors that could influence the stock's performance in the near future.

Over the past month, shares of this chipmaker have returned +18.7%, compared to the Zacks S&P 500 composite's +4.6% change. During this period, the Zacks Electronics - Semiconductors industry, which Marvell falls in, has gained 11.3%. The key question now is: What could be the stock's future direction?

While media releases or rumors about a substantial change in a company's business prospects usually make its stock 'trending' and lead to an immediate price change, there are always some fundamental facts that eventually dominate the buy-and-hold decision-making.

Revisions to Earnings Estimates

Here at Zacks, we prioritize appraising the change in the projection of a company's future earnings over anything else. That's because we believe the present value of its future stream of earnings is what determines the fair value for its stock.

Our analysis is essentially based on how sell-side analysts covering the stock are revising their earnings estimates to take the latest business trends into account. When earnings estimates for a company go up, the fair value for its stock goes up as well. And when a stock's fair value is higher than its current market price, investors tend to buy the stock, resulting in its price moving upward. Because of this, empirical studies indicate a strong correlation between trends in earnings estimate revisions and short-term stock price movements.

For the current quarter, Marvell is expected to post earnings of $0.80 per share, indicating a change of +29% from the year-ago quarter. The Zacks Consensus Estimate has changed +0.2% over the last 30 days.

The consensus earnings estimate of $3.82 for the current fiscal year indicates a year-over-year change of +34.5%. This estimate has changed +0.1% over the last 30 days.

For the next fiscal year, the consensus earnings estimate of $5.39 indicates a change of +41.1% from what Marvell is expected to report a year ago. Over the past month, the estimate has changed +0.3%.

With an impressive externally audited track record, our proprietary stock rating tool -- the Zacks Rank -- is a more conclusive indicator of a stock's near-term price performance, as it effectively harnesses the power of earnings estimate revisions. The size of the recent change in the consensus estimate, along with three other factors related to earnings estimates, has resulted in a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) for Marvell.

Story Continues

The chart below shows the evolution of the company's forward 12-month consensus EPS estimate:

12 Month EPS

Projected Revenue Growth

While earnings growth is arguably the most superior indicator of a company's financial health, nothing happens as such if a business isn't able to grow its revenues. After all, it's nearly impossible for a company to increase its earnings for an extended period without increasing its revenues. So, it's important to know a company's potential revenue growth.

For Marvell, the consensus sales estimate for the current quarter of $2.4 billion indicates a year-over-year change of +26.8%. For the current and next fiscal years, $10.84 billion and $14.83 billion estimates indicate +32.2% and +36.9% changes, respectively.

Last Reported Results and Surprise History

Marvell reported revenues of $2.22 billion in the last reported quarter, representing a year-over-year change of +22.1%. EPS of $0.8 for the same period compares with $0.6 a year ago.

Compared to the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.2 billion, the reported revenues represent a surprise of +0.86%. The EPS surprise was +1.27%.

Over the last four quarters, Marvell surpassed consensus EPS estimates three times. The company topped consensus revenue estimates three times over this period.

Valuation

No investment decision can be efficient without considering a stock's valuation. Whether a stock's current price rightly reflects the intrinsic value of the underlying business and the company's growth prospects is an essential determinant of its future price performance.

While comparing the current values of a company's valuation multiples, such as price-to-earnings (P/E), price-to-sales (P/S), and price-to-cash flow (P/CF), with its own historical values helps determine whether its stock is fairly valued, overvalued, or undervalued, comparing the company relative to its peers on these parameters gives a good sense of the reasonability of the stock's price.

The Zacks Value Style Score (part of the Zacks Style Scores system), which pays close attention to both traditional and unconventional valuation metrics to grade stocks from A to F (an A is better than a B; a B is better than a C; and so on), is pretty helpful in identifying whether a stock is overvalued, rightly valued, or temporarily undervalued.

Marvell is graded F on this front, indicating that it is trading at a premium to its peers. Click here to see the values of some of the valuation metrics that have driven this grade.

Conclusion

The facts discussed here and much other information on Zacks.com might help determine whether or not it's worthwhile paying attention to the market buzz about Marvell. However, its Zacks Rank #3 does suggest that it may perform in line with the broader market in the near term.

news.Title: 華邦電4/7~5/21向Lam Research International Sdn.Bhd訂購機器設備一批，計約18億
news.Content:

1.標的物之名稱及性質（如坐落台中市北區ＸＸ段ＸＸ小段土地）:供營業用之機器設備。

14.專業估價師開業證書字號:不適用

18.估價結果有重大差異時，其差異原因及會計師意見:不適用

news.Title: Why is KLA Corporation (KLAC) One of Louis Navellier’s Top Long-Term Stock Pick?
news.Content:
KLA Corporation (NASDAQ: KLAC ) is one of Louis Navellier’s top long-term stock picks . On May 1, analysts at Argus raised their price target for KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) to $1950 from $1750 and reiterated a Buy rating on the stock.

allstars/Shutterstock.com

The price target hike comes on the heels of KLA Corp delivering strong March-quarter results that exceeded the midpoint of its guidance ranges. Strong business momentum allowed the company to achieve revenue and earnings growth, setting the stage for an impressive year. Revenue in the quarter totaled $3.415 billion, above the midpoint guidance of $3.35 billion, as diluted earnings per share totaled $9.40, above the midpoint of the guidance.

The better-than-expected results came as KLA Corp continued to benefit from the global AI infrastructure build-out across all the major growth vectors of foundry/logic, memory, advanced packaging, and services. Similarly, analysts at Argus remain bullish on KLA Corp’s long-term outlook, owing to a demand build-up for process control and metrology solutions.

KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) is a leading global supplier of process control and yield management solutions for the semiconductor and electronics industries. They develop inspection, metrology, and data analytics tools—often powered by AI—that allow chipmakers to identify defects and measure performance on wafers and reticles during manufacturing.

While we acknowledge the potential of KLAC as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock .

Disclosure: None. Follow Insider Monkey on Google News .

news.Title: Impressive Financial Results Assert Cisco Systems, Inc. (CSCO) as a Top Tech Stock in Ken Fisher’s Portfolio
news.Content:
Cisco Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: CSCO ) is one of the top tech stocks in billionaire Ken Fisher’s portfolio . On May 13, Cisco Systems Inc. (NASDAQ:CSCO) delivered solid third-quarter fiscal 2026 results that affirmed the relevance of its technology for connecting and securing artificial intelligence. The company delivered double-digit growth on both the top and bottom lines at the high end of the guidance.

Ken Wolter / Shutterstock.com

Revenue reached a record high of $15.8 billion, up 12% year over year, driven by strong demand for broad-based products. Product revenue was up 17%, helping offset a 1% decline in service revenue. Americas remained the company’s biggest market, accounting for 14% of the growth. Amid robust revenue growth, net income on a non-GAAP basis was up 10% to $4.2 billion, as earnings per share also increased 10% to $1.06.

The robust earnings and revenue increase came as Campus networking orders increased 25% as data center switching orders grew by 40%. The strong results, driven by great execution and financial discipline, also enabled the company to deliver shareholder value while pursuing significant opportunities.

“Cisco is well-positioned as the critical infrastructure for the AI era, building on our technology leadership and customer trust, while innovating at the speed and scale that our dynamic world demands,” said Chuck Robbins, chair and CEO of Cisco.

Cisco Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:CSCO) is a global technology leader specializing in networking hardware, software, and cybersecurity services that form the backbone of modern digital infrastructure. It is heavily accelerating its focus on AI infrastructure, secure cloud connectivity, and “building the internet” for the AI era.

While we acknowledge the potential of CSCO as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. news.Title: 三星罷工矛盾台廠大利多？群聯這樣看 記憶體大老看法曝
news.Content:
三星（Samsung）近期爆發罷工衝突，市場關注是否進一步牽動DRAM與NAND Flash供需及價格走勢。群聯電子發言人呂國鼎今（21）日受訪表示，三星同時是群聯友好的客戶與供應商，因此不方便在此事件上多做評論。不過他認為，短期市場確實可能受到心理因素影響，進而牽動記憶體價格預期，但實際供給影響仍須觀察罷工持續時間。\n

呂國鼎指出，目前半導體產線多已高度自動化，即便出現停工情況，正在運作中的產線未必會立即受到衝擊，「接下來還是要看停多久。」他認為，三星罷工事件若未長期化，對供應面的實質影響仍需進一步觀察。\n

針對三星罷工事件，南亞科總經理李培瑛今日在股東會上也談及，相關影響應該都是短期效應。他表示，南韓罷工議題目前仍未真正確定是否會發生，不論最後罷工或不罷工，應該都屬於短期效應，長期仍會回歸穩定。\n

不過，對於DRAM產業後續走勢，李培瑛則指出，產業進入結構性變化後，已逐步進入穩定階段，供給吃緊延續到明年底是相當有把握的。\n

記憶體模組大廠威剛董事長陳立白日前也表示，三星罷工雖然對全年整體產能影響有限，但已引發市場強烈預期心理。在現有產能已高度吃緊的情況下，恐進一步推升DRAM與NAND Flash價格。\n

對於目前記憶體供應狀況，呂國鼎也坦言，原廠現在確實處於缺貨狀態，而在供應吃緊情況下，原廠配貨邏輯將更重視「附加價值」。他表示，群聯並非單純買進Flash再轉手賣出的貿易商，而是透過自研控制晶片、韌體與硬體設計，進一步做成SSD與各式客製化儲存產品，包括高速、防水、特殊環境應用，以及AI、車用、機器人與太空等高階應用市場。\n

「如果只是右手買進、左手賣掉，原廠會覺得那不如自己賣就好。」呂國鼎說，但若能將產品導入AI資料中心、太空或特殊高階場域，原廠就會認為這類客戶有能力創造更高價值，因此更願意提供供貨支持。\n

他也透露，群聯會主動向原廠說明產品最終應用場景，包括大型CSP、AI資料中心甚至太空應用，藉此爭取更多資源。對原廠而言，若其產品能透過群聯方案進入具指標性的應用市場，也有助於提升品牌能見度，形成雙方互利關係。\n

news.Title: Here’s What Analysts Are Saying About Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR)
news.Content:
Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: MPWR ) is one of the best semiconductor stocks with the highest upside potential right now . Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:MPWR) received several rating updates following the release of financial results for Q1 ended March 31, 2026. On May 1, TD Cowen lifted the price target on Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:MPWR) to $1,850 from $1,550 and maintained a Buy rating on the shares. The firm stated that beat/raise as the Enterprise Data outlook for 2026 moves to more than 85%, which points towards accelerating demand across AI infrastructure. It thus believes that rising power content and CPU units are adding to XPU growth.

Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:MPWR) also received a rating update from Truist the same day, with the firm lifting the price target on the stock to $1,805 from $1,396 while maintaining a Buy rating on the shares. The firm told investors in a research note that the company’s fiscal Q1 results surpassed estimates, while fiscal Q2 was guided meaningfully above consensus. It added that growth remains diversified, but the clear driver continues to be data centers/AI, which is shown in both the Enterprise Data & Comms end markets.

Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:MPWR) is involved in the design, development, and marketing of integrated power semiconductor solutions and power delivery architectures for computing and storage, industrial, automotive, communications, and consumer applications markets.

The company’s products include computers and notebooks, portable electronic devices, wireless LAN access points, monitors, infotainment applications, and medical equipment. Its operations are divided into the following geographical segments: China, the US, Taiwan, and Other.

While we acknowledge the potential of MPWR as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. news.Title: 三星大罷工點火記憶體族群！南亞科威剛股價走揚 分析師：短線題材
news.Content:
三星電子工會與資方調解破局，確定自21日起展開為期18天的大罷工，市場預估有望帶動記憶體報價上漲，激勵台記憶體族群今（20）日止跌回穩，南亞科（2408）、威剛（3260）、創見（2451）等個股同步走揚。分析師表示，三星罷工題材確實有助短線激勵記憶體股，但後續能否延續漲勢，仍須觀察個股是否成功突破盤整區間、重新轉強。

三星電子工會與公司今日召開第三次調解會議，資方未接受調解方案，導致談判破裂，宣告維持21日起大罷工18天的決定。工會聲明，同意政府提出調解方案，但該方案遭資方拒絕，因此由政府主導的調解破裂，維持罷工決定，罷工期間仍有對話空間。

記憶體族群今早盤走勢震盪。華邦電（2344）雖以紅盤開出，但隨後股價大幅震盪，盤中跌幅收斂至約1.7%，股價在116元附近整理；南亞科則翻紅上漲約2%，來到280元左右。至於威剛、創見、承啟（2425）、十銓（4967）及晶豪科（3006）等個股，也同步呈現上漲態勢。

對此，顧德投顧分析師張家豪受訪表示，三星罷工事件屬於短線消息面影響，對台灣記憶體族群確實會有激勵效果。然而，這種激勵效果能持續多久，仍須回歸到個股的趨勢，留意是否能突破盤整區間並持續走多。

記憶體族群自去年9月起經歷長波段上漲，近期出現較明顯的大量回檔。張家豪指出，從基本面來看，市場缺貨仍預期持續到2027年，基本面並未轉壞，但目前股價修正的主因在於上漲後，籌碼較混亂，在盤整期間，小額操作容易讓心理壓力過大。

張家豪建議，股價處於盤整休息期時，可考慮先將資金抽出來，待趨勢重新翻多後再行介入。以指標股華邦電為例，他分析，整理區間落在107元至128元之間，在區間內可以進行低買高賣的短線操作，但若要掌握下一波大波段行情，須等到股價突破128的區間上緣且不再回測，才算確認啟動新一輪的多頭趨勢。

王詩婷／財經特派記者，主跑勞動部、半導體、生技等

news.Title: 5/20起「特選臺灣上市上櫃綠能及電動車指數」納中碳、華邦電/刪大亞、正新等
news.Content:
「臺灣指數公司特選臺灣上市上櫃綠能及電動車指數」成分股審核結果

臺灣指數公司公布「臺灣指數公司特選臺灣上市上櫃綠能及電動車指數」成分股定期審核結果。成分股納入和刪除之變動將自2026年5月19日(星期二)交易結束後生效(亦即自2026年5月20日(星期三)起生效)。

成分股納入(10)：1723中碳、2344華邦電、3443創意、5274信驊、5536聖暉*、5871中租KY、6285啟碁、8109博大、8358金居、8926台汽電

成分股刪除(10)：1609大亞、2105正新、2360致茂、2379瑞昱、3010華立、3034聯詠、4739康普、5457宣德、6176瑞儀、9958世紀鋼

*註：成分股納入、刪除名單係定審後成分股新名單與定審資料日(20260430)成分股名單對照之結果。

大亞 本公司受邀參加華南永昌證券於115年5月27日舉辦之線上法人說明會。

news.Title: 聯電ADR19日上漲0.46美元漲幅2.69%折台股111.28元
《美股》殖利率跳高 那指連3跌 美光、Astera嗨
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-20 07:12:19 郭妍希 發佈

油價居高不下引發通膨疑慮、帶動美國10年期公債殖利率觸及一年多以來新高，衝擊那斯達克指數、標準普爾500指數連續三個交易日走跌。

道瓊工業平均指數5月19日終場下跌0.65%(322.24點)、收49,363.88點。那斯達克指數下跌0.84%(220.03點)、收25,870.71點。標準普爾500指數下跌0.67%(49.44點)、收7,353.61點。費城半導體指數上漲0.03%(2.98點)、收11,305.50點。

國際布蘭特(Brent)原油期貨19日終場雖下跌0.73%，卻仍收在每桶110美元之上，交易人士仍緊盯中東戰爭的最新訊息，這場衝突基本關閉了重要能源通道荷姆茲海峽。

美國總統川普(Donald Trump)雖在週一(18日)宣布，由於德黑蘭當局提出了一項新提案、旨在結束美伊戰爭，他已暫緩原定要在週二對伊朗發動的軍事打擊；不過，他隨後又表示，美國未來或有必要再次襲擊伊朗，只是「伊朗正在懇求達成協議」。

美國副總統范斯(JD Vance)則指出，美伊雙方在談判中已取得諸多進展，且「雙方都不希望看到軍事行動捲土重來」。

通膨預期攀升，推升公債殖利率。CNBC報價顯示，10年期公債殖利率19日盤中一度依攀升至4.689%、創2025年1月新高；30年期公債殖利率盤中也短暫觸及5.19%、創接近19年以來的新高紀錄。(註：公債價格與殖利率呈現反向走勢。)

市場開始拉高聯準會(Fed)升息機率。芝加哥商業交易所(CME) FedWatch工具顯示，聯邦基金期貨投資人19日預測，Fed 12月將聯邦基金利率上調一碼的機率多達41.7%，調高兩碼的可能性則從一週前的4.7%躍升至15.7%。

投資人將密切關注即將於本週三公布的聯邦公開市場委員會(FOMC) 4月會議記錄，以從中尋找蛛絲馬跡，評估決策官員們對於將政策立場從「偏向寬鬆」(easing bias)調整為「中立立場」(neutral stance)的支持力度究竟有多大。

標普500十一大類股有6個收低，科技、通訊服務類股成為拖累指數幅度最大的族群。殖利率走揚經常對高成長股造成壓力，因為其估值深受未來獲利預期的影響。

輝達(Nvidia Corp.)即將在週三盤後公布眾所矚目的財報。分析師看好財報表現，但選擇權市場卻 擔憂 ，輝達財報恐成為美股的關鍵轉折點。輝達在財報公布前夕下跌0.77%、收220.61美元。

AI基礎設施高速連接解決方案供應商Astera Labs逆勢飆漲13.3%、收244.26美元，漲幅居費半30支成分股之冠。資料中心高速連接解決方案供應商Credo Technology同步大漲8.14%、收168.99美元，漲幅在費半30支成分股中居次。

Astera執行長Jitendra Mohan出席摩根大通全球科技、媒體和通訊大會(JPMorgan Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference)時表示，與AI基礎設施相關的強勁需求驅動公司高速成長；上季營收達到3.08億美元，較去年同期大增93%，下一季的營收指引中位數更上看3.6億美元。另外，旗下Scorpio系列產品正在迅速崛起、成為最核心的成長引擎。他預期，在贏得雲端服務巨頭(hyperscaler)與AI平台的設計定案(design wins)後，Scorpio將在今年底前成為Astera旗下規模最大的產品線。

美國記憶體大廠美光(Micron Technology)反彈2.52%、收698.74美元，結束連續3個交易日的跌勢。快閃記憶體模組供應商SanDisk同步反彈3.77%、收1,383.29美元。Mizuho分析師Vijay Rakesh相信，至少到2027年，美光旗下NAND型快閃記憶體、DRAM的價格應會維持高檔。

Google與黑石集團(Blackstone)於週一晚間宣布，雙方將攜手建立一個全新、專注於張量處理單元(TPU)的雲端服務；TPU是Google的自研AI晶片。黑石集團計劃在初期投入500億美元的自有資金，協助合資公司在2027年上線高達500百萬瓦(MW)的雲端運算產能。Google則負責提供晶片、軟體以及各式支援服務。

向AI科技巨擘出租算力的新型雲端商(neocloud)應聲下挫。CoreWeave、Nebius Group、IREN Limited、Applied Digital分別下跌3.82%、1.07%、5.39%、6.44%。

(圖片來源：shutterstock)

news.Title: 外資賣超逾632億　調節主動式ETF、台積電
news.Content:
（中央社記者江明晏台北2026年05月19日電）台股今天跌716.26點，收在40175.56點，外資賣超逾632億元，調節主動式ETF、記憶體雙雄華邦電、南亞科，並賣超台積電逾1.7萬張，反手買進金融股與電信股。

台股今天跌716.26點，收在40175.56點，成交值（含盤後）新台幣1兆1512.19億元。三大法人合計賣超774.2億元，其中，自營商賣超223.51億元，投信買超81.66億元，外資及陸資賣超632.35億元。

值得注意的是，外資連續3個交易日賣超，累計賣超金額逾1189億元；投信連2個交易日買進，自營商連6賣。

根據公開資訊，外資今天賣超前10名中，主動統一升級50（00403A）居冠，外資賣超逾6.6萬張，主動統一台股增長（00981A）、華邦電分居2、3名，賣超張數分別約6萬張、4.8萬張，其餘依序為旺宏、元大台灣50 (0050) 、群創、力積電、主動元大AI新經濟（00990A）、南亞科、台積電。

其中，外資單日賣超台積電超過1.7萬張。

外資買超前10名中，由台新新光金居冠，外資單日買超逾3.2萬張，永豐金位居第2，外資買超逾3萬張，接續為中信金、國泰金、兆豐金、中華電、富邦金、華南金、台灣大、凱基金。

news.Title: 記憶體血流成河 誰被錯殺？專家拆解「3大鬼故事」：你相信黃仁勳還是三星高層
news.Content:
台股記憶體族群今（19）日驚現全面性重挫，包括南亞科、華邦電、旺宏、鈺創、群聯、愛普等六檔個股全數慘殺至跌停。面對大陸廠大幅擴產、三星罷工轉單落空，以及群聯發行海外可轉債（ECB）等市場傳聞夾擊，專家直言這些利空皆為短線的「鬼故事」，呼籲投資人不要亂砍股票，反而應在大跌中尋找被誤殺的價值股，作為短線來回套利的絕佳機會。\n

\n

轉單落空純屬雜音 南亞科、華邦電基本面產能早已滿載

摩爾投顧分析師林漢偉詳細剖析今天重擊記憶體市場的三大主要面向。首先，針對三星前半導體部門總裁慶桂顯（Kyung Kye-hyun）近期警告「大陸記憶體廠大擴產將導致 2027 年下半年價格反轉」一事，林漢偉直言這只是「老調重彈」，本質上與大摩（Morgan Stanley）3 月份看空2026年下半年的報告如出一轍。\n

林漢偉強調，距離2027年下半年還有超過一年時間，拿這麼遠的事來嚇現在的股價並不合理。他重申，若相信輝達（NVIDIA）執行長黃仁勳先前所言「即使擴產也追不上10倍的需求」，那麼所謂的產能過剩憂慮就不具威脅。對於投資人而言，與其陷入2027年利空的集體焦慮，不如相信黃仁勳對AI產業的權威判斷。\n

其次，市場先前因三星可能罷工，預期南亞科與華邦電將迎來轉單效益，隨後又因傳出「轉單落空」而引發恐慌性拋售。林漢偉駁斥，這是另一個被誇大的鬼故事，因為南亞科與華邦電目前的產能本就已接近滿載狀態，轉單效應充其量只是「額外加分」項，即便最終沒有轉單，兩家公司的基本面依然強勁。\n

群聯發行8億美元ECB賣壓 實為「短空長多」的拉抬前奏

最後，針對群聯今日宣布發行8億美元海外無擔保可轉債（ECB，分為 A、B 兩券各 4 億美元）引發的短線賣壓，市場擔憂外資會採取「套利操作」，即在現貨市場變賣現股，轉而認購債券。\n

林漢偉對此解讀為「短空長多」。公司此時發債募資，是為了充實資金、囤積晶片庫存以因應未來需求。從資本市場邏輯來看，若發行公司在債券到期時「不想還錢」（即不想支付現金償還本金與利息），最直接的手段就是將股價拉抬至轉換價格（3418至3555 元）之上。如此一來，債券持有人便會主動選擇將債券轉換為股票並在市場賣出，公司就不用自掏腰包還債、減少現金壓力。\n

舉例來說，華邦電先前發行國內無擔保可轉債時，訂價在109 元，定價完成後股價雖一度修正跌破該價位；而南亞科私募價格在224元時也曾引發市場憂慮，最終兩家公司股價成功回到該水準之上。\n

林漢偉直言，記憶體族群具備低本益比、高殖利率的特性，在利率走高、市場資金轉向防禦型或價值型股票時，這類股票具備吸引力。面對記憶體的「鬼故事」，利用重挫尋找被誤殺且有籌碼支撐的價值股，在後續反彈中進行來回操作。\n

台股記憶體族群今（19）日驚現全面性重挫，包括南亞科、華邦電、旺宏、鈺創、群聯、愛普等六檔個股全數慘殺至跌停。面對大陸廠大幅擴產、三星罷工轉單落空，以及群聯發行海外可轉債（ECB）等市場傳聞夾擊，專家直言這些利空皆為短線的「鬼故事」，呼籲投資人不要亂砍股票，反而應在大跌中尋找被誤殺的價值股，作為短線來回套利的絕佳機會。\n

\n

舉例來說，華邦電先前發行國內無擔保可轉債時，訂價在109 元，定價完成後股價雖一度修正跌破該價位；而南亞科私募價格在224元時也曾引發市場憂慮，最終兩家公司股價成功回到該水準之上。\n

林漢偉直言，記憶體族群具備低本益比、高殖利率的特性，在利率走高、市場資金轉向防禦型或價值型股票時，這類股票具備吸引力。面對記憶體的「鬼故事」，利用重挫尋找被誤殺且有籌碼支撐的價值股，在後續反彈中進行來回操作。\n

news.Title: 《陸股》滬指漲0.92%、日K連二紅；恆指漲0.48%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-19 17:44:09 新聞中心 發佈

中國滬深兩市三大指數今(19)日集體續開低，市場探底回升，三大指數漲跌不一，滬指漲近1%，科創50大漲逾3.8%。盤面上，電力、半導體、公用事業、IT服務、軟體開發、電網設備板塊漲幅居前，能源金屬、稀土、小金屬、航太裝備板塊跌幅居前。今兩市個股漲多跌少，上漲個股逾3,600檔。滬指終場收漲0.92%，日K連二紅。

上證指數今收於4169.54點、漲0.92%；深證成指收於15569.91點、漲0.26%；創業板指收於3908.44點、跌0.16%；科創50收於1775.13點、漲3.81%；中證A500收於6121.09點、漲0.60%。

成交量方面，滬市今成交1兆3,065億元(人民幣,下同)，深市成交1兆5,800億元，兩市成交額達2兆8,865億元，較前一交易日量減少。

從盤面上來看，雲辦公、電力、智普AI板塊漲幅居前；賽馬概念、能源金屬、小金屬板塊跌幅居前。

港股方面，香港恆生指數今日開盤上漲0.07%。盤面上，恆生科技指數漲0.26%，權重科技股多數上漲，騰訊漲逾2%，網易、百度、阿里巴巴、美團漲逾1%；石油庫存創紀錄暴跌，石油股午後拉升，中國海洋石油漲近3%。另一方面，半導體、晶片股下挫，英諾賽科跌逾8%；汽車股再度下挫，蔚來、理想汽車跌逾4%。恆指終場收於25797.85點、漲0.48%，日K翻紅。

《陸股》滬指失守4200點、跌1.52%；恆指日K翻黑

《陸股》滬指漲0.67%攀近11年高；恆指漲0.15%

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 《韓股》半導體類股承壓，KOSPI指數收跌逾3%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-19 16:49:06 數位內容中心 發佈

韓股今(19)日下挫，KOSPI指數終場收在7271.66點，下跌244.38點或3.25%；韓國KOSDAQ指數則收在1084.36點，下跌26.73點或2.41%。匯率方面，美元兌韓元收於1,507.8韓元，顯示韓元呈偏弱走勢。韓股今日跌幅反映市場因外資大規模賣出、國際利率與油價上揚，以及中東地緣政治不確定性交織導致的風險偏好降溫。\n

\n

\n資金面與宏觀方面，外資在韓國KOSPI指數市場進行大規模拋售，造成市場成交與波動性急劇放大；同時，美國長天期公債收益率走高與油價上揚推升美元需求，進一步擠壓韓股資金面。

\n盤面上，半導體類股承壓，SK Hynix(000660.KS)跌5.16%，主要受到Seagate相關發言引發的供需疑慮，加上Micron等國際個股回檔傳導影響；Hyundai Motor(005380.KS)、SK Square(402340.KS)等大型股亦出現顯著下跌，整體拖累韓國KOSPI指數表現。

\n產業輪動與個股方面，保險、食品飲料及電力與瓦斯等族群相對抗跌，表現強勢；相較之下，機械設備、證券、營建以及運輸設備與零組件等類股領跌。韓國KOSDAQ指數方面，多數中小型股同步下挫，且下跌家數明顯多於上漲家數。

美股焦點：MGIC Investment Corporation(MTG.US) | 01:46:44(GMT+8)

美房貸利率6.57%創3月來新高 房市回溫恐受挫

news.Title: 《日股》日經收跌0.44%、連4跌；TOPIX漲0.63%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-19 16:15:29 數位內容中心 發佈

日股今(19)日走勢分歧。日經225指數收於60550.59點，下跌265.36點或0.44%，連續第4個交易日下跌；東證股價指數(TOPIX)收於3850.67點，上漲24.16點或0.63%。主要驅動因素為國際長期利率走高與中東地緣政治風險壓低風險偏好；同時，日本公債殖利率波動與決算季促成資金在高估值科技股及景氣敏感內需股之間輪動。

國際與國內宏觀面向來看，受美國長期利率上升及半導體相關指數走弱影響，見外資對高估值的AI/半導體族群進行獲利了結；另中東局勢造成風險溢價上升，市場擔憂利率與能源價格上行可能衝擊全球與日本經濟。雖然日本內閣府公布之名目GDP成長顯示經濟仍有韌性，且日本10年期公債殖利率自高檔回落至約2.74%，但利率波動已對資金面與估值造成影響並放大市場選股差異。

類股與個股表現方面，半導體與AI相關權重股整體走弱，愛德萬測試(6857.JP)、東京威力科創(8035.JP)、鎧俠(285A.JP)、Lasertec(6920.JP)等表現疲弱；軟銀集團(9984.JP)、藤倉(5803.JP)、FANUC(6954.JP)亦同步回檔。相較之下，內需與服務類股獲買盤支撐，迅銷(9983.JP)、Recruit Holdings(6098.JP)、Konami Group(9766.JP)、KDDI(9433.JP)、Bandai Namco(7832.JP)，以及保險股MS&AD(8725.JP)、Tokio Marine(8766.JP)表現相對堅挺，帶動TOPIX整體表現優於日經225指數。

《日股》日經收跌近1%、連三跌

美股焦點：Post Holdings(POST.US) | 05:39:01(GMT+8)

news.Title: 記憶體又遭血洗！群聯慘跌停、南亞科崩9％ 兇手竟是這大廠拋出警訊？
news.Content:
記憶體族群今（19）日遭逢利空突襲，盤中湧現爆量恐慌賣壓，指標股群聯亮燈跌停，華邦電、南亞科、旺宏等紛紛暴跌9%，短線多方信心備受打擊。市場利空主要來自硬碟機大廠希捷（Seagate）發出警告，強調公司寧可選擇「技術轉型」也不盲目擴產，引發市場擔憂大廠瘋狂擴產恐導致「產能過剩」窘境；與此同時，DRAM 現貨價格持續出現雜音，導致先前對於市場復甦的樂觀預期蒙上陰影，國內記憶體個股應聲爆量下挫。\n

\n

大廠拋不盲目擴產震撼彈

綜合外媒報導，硬碟機大廠希捷執行長莫斯利（Dave Mosley）於 18 日出席摩根大通全球科技、媒體和通訊大會時表示，建造新工廠「實在太花時間了」，甚至可能導致公司陷入產能過剩的窘境。Mosley 強調，希捷未來的戰略核心是透過「技術轉型」（technology transitions）來推升總儲存容量（exabyte），而非一味增設新的製造設施。\n

莫斯利解釋，若此時抽離團隊去建造新工廠或引進新機器，將花費過多時間，雖最終會迎來更多產能，但相對地會減緩技術升級的速度。希捷目前的目標是透過技術推進，將單張碟片（platter）容量從3TB提升至 4TB 和 5TB，以此實現 24~26% 左右的年複合成長率（CAGR）。因此，公司做法是在現有廠房增設機台來強化產能，而非純粹追求廠房擴建。\n

然而，這番言論卻點燃全球投資人的恐懼，外界開始擔憂半導體業擴產速度恐怕不夠快，恐難以應付AI引發的銷售熱潮。美股18日相關族群集體重挫，希捷應聲大跌 6.87%，記憶體大廠美光（Micron）同步重挫 5.95%、收681.54 美元，創下 5 月 7 日以來收盤新低；快閃記憶體模組供應商 SanDisk（晟碟）、硬碟大廠威騰（WD）也分別下跌 5.30% 與 4.85%。\n

專家示警合約價「死亡交叉」歷史重演

除美股巨頭重挫的利空外，DRAM現貨價格近日出現雜音，部分買家觀望心態濃厚。資深分析師蔡明翰指出，投資人在記憶體族群的操作上，務必緊盯「現貨報價」的走勢。他透露，DDR4 現貨報價在1月底見到 79 元高點後，目前已一路走跌並跌破60 元大關。\n

蔡明翰分析，即便目前許多記憶體廠商端表示，第二、第三季的「合約價」仍在走高，但「現貨價」才是真實市況的領先指標。一旦現貨價持續走低，未來與合約價出現「死亡交叉」，即宣告整體產業趨勢恐將出現反轉，甚至重演2021 年時，記憶體股價高點比獲利高點「提早半年出現」的歷史修正走勢。\n

法人提醒，台股記憶體族群今日帶量下殺，已使短線技術面壓力大幅升高，部分個股甚至出現「破線」跡象，多方信心全面受挫，建議投資人在此時應保持冷靜與觀望態度，切忌在下跌趨勢確立的初期盲目進場搶反彈，靜待報價與技術面止穩後再行布局。\n

news.Title: 群聯ECB完成定價　籌8億美元用於外幣購料
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中新竹2026年5月19日電）記憶體控制晶片廠群聯 (8299) 完成第1次海外無擔保可轉換公司債（ECB）定價，募集8億美元，將全數用於外幣購料，支應持續拓展全球儲存控制晶片與儲存解決方案業務需求。

群聯表示，這次發行ECB是群聯首次於國際資本市場進行籌資，分為A、B兩券，分別為新台幣連結、美元交割及純美元計價的結構，兩券發行規模皆為4億美元。

其中，A券初始轉換價格為新台幣3418.75元，依5月18日收盤價2735元計算，轉換溢價率為25%；B券初始轉換價格為3555.5元，轉換溢價率為30%。兩券皆將在新加坡交易所上市，預定發行日為5月26日。

群聯指出，公司正從傳統儲存型快閃記憶體（NAND Flash）控制晶片與NAND Flash儲存方案公司，逐步轉型成為AI儲存基礎架構暨邊緣AI運算平台供應商。

群聯表示，未來將以AI資料平台、企業級儲存產品，以及相關軟硬體方案作為主要動能。因應AI應用加速進入各行各業，對高效能儲存與資料處理需求持續增加，群聯將持續推出更貼近客戶需求、附加價值更高的解決方案。

news.Title: 上櫃公司第1季營收獲利大躍進，五家EPS超過30元
news.Content:
【財訊快報／記者何美如報導】上櫃公司115年第1季營運表現亮眼，500家公司獲利較去年同期成長，約占上櫃公司56％，獲利成長金額前三大之產業分別為半導體業、電腦及週邊設備業、金融業。有獲利的上櫃公司共計656家，約占上櫃公司之74%，其中，有五家每股盈餘(EPS)超過30元，群聯(8299)以68.8元居冠，宜鼎(5289)57.49元、青雲(5386)43.05元居二、三名，股王信驊(5274)以37.41元居第四名。櫃買中心表示，上櫃公司應於115年5月15日公告申報115年第1季財務報告者共計887家。經統計上櫃公司115年第1季營收約8,536億元，較前一年同期增加19%；另稅前淨利1,365億元，較前一年同期增加617億元，增加82%。

上櫃公司115年第1季獲利較去年同期成長之公司計有500家，約占上櫃公司56％，獲利成長金額前三大之產業分別為半導體業、電腦及週邊設備業、金融業。

在EPS方面，經統計EPS超過10元之公司計有13家，其中有五家超過30元，群聯、宜鼎、青雲分別以68.8元、57.49元、43.05元居前三名，信驊以37.41元居第四名，第五名為威剛(3260)達30.05元。5元以上未達10元的公司計15家，2元以上未達5元之公司計98家，整體獲利上櫃公司共計656家，約占上櫃公司之74%。

上櫃公司115年第1季獲利較去年同期成長之公司計有500家，約占上櫃公司56％，獲利成長金額前三大之產業分別為半導體業、電腦及週邊設備業、金融業。

在EPS方面，經統計EPS超過10元之公司計有13家，其中有五家超過30元，群聯、宜鼎、青雲分別以68.8元、57.49元、43.05元居前三名，信驊以37.41元居第四名，第五名為威剛(3260)達30.05元。5元以上未達10元的公司計15家，2元以上未達5元之公司計98家，整體獲利上櫃公司共計656家，約占上櫃公司之74%。

news.Title: 《美股》美光摔、費半軟 川普緩攻伊朗推升道瓊
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-19 07:08:29 郭妍希 發佈

公債殖利率跳升、油價高漲引發通膨及利率恐偏高的疑慮，帶動投資人將科技類股部分獲利了結，那斯達克指數、標準普爾500指數與費城半導體指數18日全面走低。不過，美國總統川普(Donald Trump)暫緩對伊朗發動攻擊，令盤勢跌幅收斂，道瓊工業平均指數更以上漲作收。

道瓊工業平均指數5月18日終場上漲0.32%(159.95點)、收49,686.12點。那斯達克指數下跌0.51%(134.41點)、收26,090.73點。標準普爾500指數下跌0.07%(5.45點)、收7,403.05點。費城半導體指數下挫2.47%(285.95點)、收11,302.52點。

受到荷姆茲海峽持續關閉干擾原油運輸、導致油價與通膨居高不下衝擊，美國10年期公債殖利率18日稍早一度觸及2025年2月以來新高。英國30年期公債殖利率也隨日本長天期公債殖利率走揚、攀升至1990年代末期以來新高。

西德州中級(WTI)原油期貨18日終場勁揚約3%、收每桶108.66美元。國際布蘭特(Brent)原油期貨也上漲逾2%、收每桶112.10美元。

不過，川普週一(18日)於社群平台Truth Social 發文稱 ，將暫緩原定於週二對伊朗進行的攻擊後，油價漲勢應聲收斂。川普指出，這項決定是應卡達、沙烏地阿拉伯與阿拉伯聯合大公國(UAE)領袖的要求；這些國家的領導人表示，「嚴肅的談判正在進行中」，有望達成一份美國「非常能夠接受」的協議。

川普週日才剛警告伊朗必須「快點採取行動」，否則「將變得一無所有」。

除了地緣政治的變數外，上週公布的最新通膨數據，也讓聯聯會(Fed)短期內降息的希望變得微乎其微。WEBs Investments執行長Ben Fulton表示，通膨問題真實不假，油價是個分水嶺。他直言，這股通膨壓力將很難被抵消。

Fulton認為，這代表中東局勢若無正向發展(尤其是關於荷姆茲海峽)，股市將自此陷入震盪區間。可以預見，投資人會迅速落袋為安。

標普500上週四(5月14日)的收盤較3月30日低點強彈逾18%；3月30日正是2月下旬美伊戰爭爆發以來，指數創下的最低收盤紀錄。同一期間，受惠於AI狂潮及科技巨頭強勁的財報表現，投資人選擇性忽略通膨威脅，推動那指大漲約28%。

Ingalls & Snyder資深投資組合策略師Tim Ghriskey表示，人們對短時間內出現的巨大漲幅感到擔憂，因此有些獲利了結賣壓出籠。

美國上週公佈比預期火熱的通膨數據後，芝加哥商業交易所(CME) FedWatch工具顯示，聯邦基金期貨投資人18日預測，Fed年底前將聯邦基金利率上調25個基點(1碼)的可能性為36.7%。

市場靜待輝達(Nvidia Corp.)即將於本週三(20日)美股盤後公布的財報。這家晶片巨擘是拖累標普週一走勢的最大成分股，跌幅來到1.33%。輝達晶圓代工夥伴台積電(2330) ADR同步下跌2.08%、收395.95美元。

個股變化方面，硬碟機大廠希捷(Seagate Technology)執行長Dave Mosley 18日出席摩根大通全球科技、媒體和通訊大會(JPMorgan Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference)時，警告在「滿足人工智慧激增的需求」方面陷入困境。他直言，建造新工廠「實在太花時間了」。Mosley這番言論點燃投資人恐懼，外界開始擔心半導體業的擴產速度恐怕不夠快，難以迎合AI引發的銷售熱潮。

希捷應聲大跌6.87%、收740.84美元，創5月4日以來收盤新低。美國記憶體大廠美光(Micron Technology, Inc.)同步重挫5.95%、收681.54美元，創5月7日以來收盤新低。

(圖片來源：shutterstock)

news.Title: How Big Could the AI Data Center Opportunity Be for Navitas?
news.Content: The artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure is set to become a major long-term growth catalyst for Navitas Semiconductor NVTS as hyperscalers are increasing power requirements inside next-generation data centers. This shift is creating a large and fast-growing opportunity for the company’s gallium nitride (GaN) and silicon carbide (SiC) power semiconductor portfolio. The company estimates the AI ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Navitas Semiconductor (NVTS) is positioned to benefit from the AI infrastructure boom, with the AI data center market estimated to be a $1.4-$2.5 billion SAM opportunity by 2030.
• The company projects GaN and SiC adoption in AI data centers to grow at a 66-87% CAGR between 2025 and 2030, driven by efficiency and power density demands.
• Navitas estimates potential GaN and SiC semiconductor content of $25,000-$35,000 per megawatt in future AI infrastructure deployments.
• AI infrastructure revenues for Navitas grew 50% sequentially in Q1 2026, exceeding expectations, and the company believes its dual GaN/SiC offering provides a strategic advantage.
news.Keywords: AI data centers, power semiconductors, GaN, SiC, market opportunity

news.Title: ON Semiconductor Stock Soars 60% in 3 Months: Still a Smart Bet?
news.Content: ON Semiconductor Corporation ON has been one of the semiconductor sector’s strongest performers lately, with the stock surging 60.1% over the past three months, compared with the industry’s rise of 29.2%. The rally has been fueled by a combination of improving cyclical demand, accelerating artificial intelligence data-center opportunities and rising confidence that the company has moved beyond the worst phase of the semiconductor downturn. Investors were especially encouraged by ON Semiconductor’s first-quarter 2026 results, where both revenues and earnings exceeded expectations while management projected stronger growth ahead. A major driver behind the stock’s sharp ...
news.AI_Summary:
• ON Semiconductor (ON) stock has surged 60.1% in three months, outperforming the semiconductor sector, driven by improving cyclical demand and AI data center opportunities.
• First-quarter 2026 results exceeded expectations, with AI data center revenues up over 30% sequentially and projected to double year-over-year in 2026.
• The company is a key beneficiary of AI infrastructure growth, supplying power-management chips for AI servers and hyperscale data centers.
• Automotive semiconductor revenues reached $797 million in Q1 2026, returning to growth, with significant traction in EVs, especially in China, and adoption of its Treo platform for next-gen vehicle architectures.
• Gross margin expanded to 38.5% in Q1 2026, with expectations for further improvement due to rising utilization and higher-margin product mix.

news.Title: 晶豪科4月獲利年增1429%　每股純益6.32元
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中新竹2026年05月18日電）記憶體廠晶豪科 (3006) 自結4月歸屬母公司淨利新台幣18.48億元，較去年同期增加1429%，每股純益6.32元。

受惠記憶體市場熱絡價格高漲，晶豪科4月營收攀高至46.34億元，創下歷史新高，年增349%；累計前4月營收119.01億元，年增202.48%。

晶豪科因有價證券於集中交易市場達公布注意交易資訊標準，公布4月自結歸屬母公司淨利18.48億元，年增1429%，每股純益6.32元。晶豪科累計前4月歸屬母公司淨利39.12億元，每股純益13.54元。

晶豪科5月來股價自169.5元震盪走高，今天收在252元，累計上漲82.5元，漲幅達48.67%。

news.Title: 《陸股》滬指跌0.09%、惟日K翻紅；恆指日K連三黑
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-18 17:43:21 新聞中心 發佈

中國國家統計局今(18)日公布今(2026)年4月經濟數據，其中工業增加值年增4.1%、遜預期；消費品零售總額年增0.2%，遜預期、寫近三年半新低；前4月固定資產投資年減1.6%，轉負成長、遜預期。中國滬深兩市三大指數今日集體開低，市場全天寬幅震盪，三大指數集體收跌。盤面上，電子化學品、元件、煤炭、通信服務、金屬新材料板塊漲幅居前，稀土、醫療美容、乘用車、化學纖維、貴金屬、保險板塊跌幅居前。今兩市個股跌多漲少，下跌個股逾3,000檔。滬指終場收跌0.09%，惟日K翻紅。

上證指數今收於4131.53點、跌0.09%；深證成指收於15530.23點、跌0.20%；創業板指收於3914.88點、跌0.36%；科創50收於1709.96點、漲0.81%；中證A500收於6084.51點、跌0.35%。

成交量方面，滬市今成交1兆3,151億元(人民幣,下同)，深市成交1兆5,789億元，兩市成交額達2兆8,940億元，較前一交易日量縮約13%。

從盤面上來看，科創次新股、油氣開採及服務、華為盤古板塊漲幅居前；賽馬概念、足球概念、汽車整車板塊跌幅居前。

港股今日持續走弱。盤面上，恆生科技指數跌1.95%，權重科技股全線走低，網易跌逾2%，騰訊、快手、京東跌逾1%，百度、美團、阿里巴巴、小米均下跌；燃油車掀起降價搶市潮，汽車股大幅下跌，其中理想汽車重挫逾14%。另一方面，中國電信推出系列試商用Token套餐，電信股走強，中國電信H股漲逾6%，石油股活躍，中國海洋石油漲逾1%。恆指終場收於25675.18點、跌1.11%，日K連三黑。

《陸股》滬指失守4200點、跌1.52%；恆指日K翻黑

《陸股》滬指漲0.67%攀近11年高；恆指漲0.15%

news.Title: 《韓股》消息面致先挫後揚，KOSPI收漲0.31%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-18 16:52:42 數位內容中心 發佈

韓股今(18)日走勢分歧。韓國KOSPI指數終場收在7516.04點，上漲22.86點或0.31%，盤中最低觸及7142.71點、盤中高點為7636.20點；韓國KOSDAQ指數則收在1111.09點，下跌18.73點或1.66%。受到國際油價飆升與美國長短期公債利率大幅走高影響，開盤出現恐慌性拋售，一度觸發程式化交易暫停機制，隨後因政府對三星勞資分歧表態而改變風險預期，整體呈現高檔波動、指數走勢分歧的格局。

盤面上，Samsung Electronics(005930.KS)與SK Hynix(000660.KS)在盤中遭遇急跌後出現明顯回補買盤，最終分別上漲3.88%、1.15%，Samsung Electronics Pfd(005935.KS)亦回升。市場報導指出，法院對Samsung Electronics勞資爭議相關禁制令，以及政府高層介入協調共同降低了對生產中斷的擔憂，促成大型半導體股的短暫抗跌。

此外，Hyundai Motor(005380.KS)跌5.29%，HD Hyundai Heavy Industries(329180.KS)跌3.91%，LG Energy Solution(373220.KS)跌2.16%，顯示非半導體權值股承壓情況明顯。資金動向方面，盤面呈現外資持續撤離，散戶與機構接手的結構性特徵，程式化交易亦顯示非套利賣壓偏重，放大了盤中波動。

台股焦點：新產(2850.TW)

《韓股》KOSPI重挫逾6% 權值股走弱/類股齊跌

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 《日股》日經收跌近1%、連三跌
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-18 16:05:52 數位內容中心 發佈

日股今(18)日走弱，連續三日下跌，呈現震盪整理格局。日經225指數收於60815.95點，下跌593.34點或0.97%；東證股價指數(TOPIX)收於3826.51點，下跌37.46點或0.97%。整體賣壓主要受到原油價格走高、日美長期利率上升，以及地緣政治風險相關影響，使買盤動能明顯轉弱。

權值股與類股表現方面，AI與半導體相關權值股遭獲利了結，愛德萬測試(6857.JP)與東京威力科創(8035.JP)走弱，藤倉(5803.JP)與軟銀集團(9984.JP)也承壓；Recruit Holdings(6098.JP)、部分精密機器股及服務業相對抗跌。汽車類股與輸送用機器、紡織製品、批發業與建設業多數走弱。

《歐股》憂通膨失控、歐股挫 特諾本逆勢飆

《日股》權值股帶動，日經收漲0.84%

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 【國票金控晨訊】台股估盤下開出 盤中留意權值股
news.Content:
日期：2026年 5月18日

※操作建議與結論

通膨憂慮再起，美股全數收跌 台股高檔震盪加劇，留意記憶體族群

今日盤勢及未來走勢：(留意記憶體布局機會)

美中關係未出現明顯降溫，加上美債殖利率上升，通膨壓力再次升溫，美股

主要指數全數收跌，幅度介於 -4.02% 至 -1.07%，台積電ADR下跌 3.2% ，台指

期夜盤下跌487點，預估今日台股盤下開出，盤中留意權值股表現以做為今日進

出場依據。

※短線看法

雖然美伊兩國元首會談氣氛融洽，不過荷姆茲海峽仍未順利通航

，高油價持續讓市場回頭聚焦通膨，美公債殖利率維持在高檔下也為市場樂觀氛

圍罩起一股陰霾，操作上盡量避免追高。

※操作建議

另外可留意記憶體族群，除了記憶體報價持續在高檔，對相關類股營運起到

相當程度助益外，龍頭廠三星電子恐於近日罷工，恐讓原本就緊張的供應再現短

缺，在當前的盤勢中可多留意布局時機。

※重點產業與族群：新增【8028 昇陽半導體】

記憶體 – 2408 南亞科、5289 宜鼎、8299 群聯

觀點：記憶體供需持續緊張，加上三星勞資談判破裂，工會恐在近期宣布罷

工，恐讓原本就緊張的供應再現短缺，在當前的盤勢中可多留意布局時機。

news.Title: 【統一證券晨訊】多頭架構鬆動　台股震盪回測支撐
news.Content:
日期：2026年 5月18日

※盤勢分析

美、日公債殖利率飆升，避險情緒攀升，台股震盪回測支撐

※昨日盤勢

路透社傳美國擬批准輝達向中國出口H200晶片的消息，市場情緒瞬間被點燃

，台股順勢以41830點紅盤開出，早盤最高甚至衝上42408點，再次寫下歷史新頁

。然而，創高後的賣壓如排山倒海而來，主要是市場對Fed理事米蘭辭職引發降

息預期降溫，和中國國家主席對台海議題的態度強硬，指數一路下殺，終場大跌

579點。權值股方面，台積電下跌0.22%，鴻海上漲1.63%，聯發科下跌4.25%，廣

達下跌8.52%，台達電下跌3.71%。

盤面強勢股，中華化、訊芯-KY、昇陽半導體、盟立、昇貿、大立光、頎邦

、宇峻、所羅門、美利達等漲停；台汽電、精材、牧德、科妍、正達、揚明光等

漲幅6%以上；盤面弱勢股，尖點、台勝科、樺漢、金山電、群翊、精測、華星光

等跌停；華新科、華城、臻鼎-KY、景碩、台光電、南亞科、欣興等跌幅5%以上

。終場台灣加權指數下跌 579.39 點，以41172.36點作收，成交量為1.31兆元。

觀察盤面變化，三大類股漲跌互見，電子下跌1.59%、傳產下跌0.89%、金融上漲

0.33%。在次族群部份以光電、造紙、運動休閒表現較佳，分別上漲2.02%、

1.26%、0.93%。

※資金動向

三大法人合計賣超367.37億元。其中外資賣超104.27億元，投信賣超13.67

億元，自營商賣超249.43億元。外資買超前五大為群創、富邦金、鴻海、力積電

、台新新光金；賣超前五大為仁寶、廣達、南亞科、彰銀、燿華。投信買超前五

大為聯電、華邦電、國巨*、台積電、光頡；賣超前五大為富邦金、國泰金、台

新新光金、裕民、凱基金。資券變化方面，融資減63.38億元，融資餘額為

4927.97億元，融券增0.26萬張，融券餘額為23.17萬張。外資台指期部位，空單

減少158口，淨空單部位50963口，借券賣出金額377.86億元。類股成交比重：電

子90.23%、傳產7.25%、金融2.52%。

※今日盤勢分析

近期台股技術面出現明顯警訊，周K線留下長達1200點的長上影線，顯示上

方賣壓沉重。隨中國拒買H200晶片、美股高檔回落、費半指數重挫4%，外資期貨

淨空單水位居高不下，直接反映外資對後市高度戒慎恐懼。在全球通膨隱憂復燃

、油價潛在飆漲風險，以及台積電公告處分世界先進股份的籌碼面干擾下，多頭

架構已現鬆動。預估指數於5日線及月線之間震盪整理。

台股後市分析如下：第一、美國總統川普15日結束對中國的國是訪問。華爾

街日報報導，川普向記者表示，兩人在伊朗問題上的看法「非常相似」，都希望

衝突盡快結束。在結束前，川普感謝習近平的款待，並再次邀請習近平於9月訪

問白宮。

第二、台積電15日宣布計劃售出世界先進 (5347) 普通股，出售股數不超過

1億5,200萬股，約相當於8.1%的世界先進公司已發行股本，台積公司計劃採鉅額

交易方式執行本次出售，預計出售對象為財務投資機構。

第三、週五大盤收上影線黑K棒，跌破了極為重要的5日與10日均線，這代表

短期強勢多頭格局已經出現破綻。指標部分，KD與RSI均已出現轉折向下，MACD

柱狀體由紅翻黑，這意味著空方開始佔據主導權；大盤回檔整理，第一階段先關

注四萬點整股關卡及月線支撐性，短期回檔整理未結束前，建議多看少做。

第四、盤面資金聚焦機器人、被動元件、光學鏡頭等族群，包括所羅門、和

椿、蜜望實、日電貿、大立光、玉晶光等表現強勢。

※投資策略

市場聚焦5/19 Google I/O大會、5/20輝達財報及6月上旬的Computex展，其

中輝達財報數據將決定AI供應鏈能否維持多頭火種的關鍵。荷姆茲海峽遲未解封

，油價再度走揚，近期美國與日本公債殖利率飆升，引發全球資金降低風險性資

產配置，建議投資人降低槓桿及持股成數，以應對波動風險。長線維持看好績優

AI股，追蹤族群：台積電及先進製程/封裝、高速傳輸(含光傳輸)、載板與PCB、

機箱滑軌、被動元件、航太衛星、特用化學及高殖利率概念等族群。

news.Title: 《美股》川習會沒突破+憂通膨 輝達/費半臉綠
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-18 06:19:54 郭妍希 發佈

受到油價跳高引發全球通膨疑慮、公債殖利率跳升衝擊，美國四大指數15日全面拉回。

道瓊工業平均指數5月15日終場下跌1.07%(537.29點)、收49,526.17點；週K線下跌0.17%。那斯達克指數下跌1.54%(410.08點)、收26,225.14點，結束連續2個交易日創歷史收盤新高的態勢；週K線下跌0.08%，結束連續6週漲勢。標準普爾500指數下跌1.24%(92.74點)、收7,408.50點，結束連續2個交易日創歷史收盤新高的態勢；週K線上漲0.13%，已連續第7週走揚。費城半導體指數重挫4.02%(485.32點)、收11,588.46點；週K線下跌1.59%，結束連續6週漲勢。

儘管面臨賣壓，標普500仍舊寫下連續七週漲勢，連漲週數創2023年12月以來新高。

Slatestone Wealth市場策略長Kenny Polcari表示，人們終於意識到股市已經漲過頭，對於債市及經濟數據暗藏的警訊不夠關注，而是被這波AI動能交易沖昏頭。

美國總統川普(Donald Trump)與伊朗外長 阿拉格奇(Abbas Araqchi)雙方言論挑釁，引發了外界質疑兩國脆弱的休戰協議能否延續。川普接受Fox News專訪時表示，他對伊朗「已沒有多大耐性」，稱「他們應該敲定協議。」

市場原本期盼荷姆茲海峽能迅速恢復通航，如今希望卻被澆熄。油價應聲跳高。美國西德州中級(WTI)原油期貨15日終場勁揚4.2%、收在每桶105.42美元。國際布蘭特(Brent)原油期貨也勁揚3.35%、收於109.26美元。

公債殖利率同步走揚。路透社報價顯示，美國10年期公債殖利率15日觸及2025年5月以來新高；當時市場正因川普的「解放日」(Liberation Day)關稅宣言而陷入劇烈動盪。

全球公債殖利率也因愈來愈多證據顯示伊朗戰爭開始衝擊經濟而跳漲。

這個週五是鮑爾(Jerome Powell)擔任美國聯準會(Fed)主席的最後一天。在任期內，他帶領美國經濟渡過了全球疫情、通膨飆升，以及數輪的升息與降息週期。

即將上任的Fed新主席華許(Kevin Warsh)則面臨著沉重困境，若曠日廢時的美伊戰爭導致通膨居高不下(sticky inflation)，他可能會被迫重啟升息。

Keator Group執行合夥人Matthew Keator表示，「今天股市走勢疲軟凸顯了近期通膨恐非暫時性的疑慮。在數據出現持久、有意義的轉變前，難以想像新任主席會傳達除了『至多保持中立』以外的任何政策立場。」

市場開始調高升息預期。芝加哥商業交易所(CME) FedWatch工具顯示，聯邦基金期貨投資人15日預測，Fed在12月將聯邦基金利率上調25個基點(1碼)的可能性為40%，遠高於一週前的13.6%。

另外，川普與中國國家主席習近平的會晤幾乎沒有取得任何實質成果，北京方面也未對解決美伊衝突提供明確協助。這讓投資人感到失望。

波音(Boeing Co.) 14日下挫4.73%後，15日續跌3.8%、收220.49美元，創4月21日以來收盤新低。川普14日於川習會後接受Fox News專訪表示，中國已同意採購200架波音(Boeing)飛機。這讓分析師感到失望。舉例來說，Jefferies原本預測會採購500架。

儘管輝達(Nvidia Corp.)執行長黃仁勳(Jensen Huang)趕在最後一刻加入川普訪中代表團、引發市場猜測AI晶片「H200」有望正式銷往中國的期待，但美國貿易代表葛里爾(Jamieson Greer) 15日 直言 ，華盛頓對先進晶片的出口管制並非本次中美官員討論的重點。輝達應聲下挫4.42%、收225.32美元。輝達晶圓代工夥伴台積電(2330) ADR、競爭對手超微(AMD) ADR同步下滑3.2%、5.69%。

其他個股變化方面，市場謠傳，英國半導體矽智財(IP)巨擘安謀(Arm Holdings PLC)面臨美國聯邦貿易委員會(FTC)的反壟斷調查，主要涉及半導體技術的授權問題。FTC 正在調查安謀是否試圖非法壟斷部分半導體市場。知情人士透露，監管機構正在評估，安謀是否會對用來設計中央處理器(CPU)的晶片藍圖，使出拒絕授權或降低授權協議級別的手段。安謀ADR應聲重挫8.46%、收209.16美元，跌幅居費半30支成分股之冠。

微軟(Microsoft Corp.)逆勢勁揚3.05%、收421.92美元，主因華爾街知名億萬富翁艾克曼(Bill Ackman)旗下避險基金Pershing Square揭露持股。

(圖片來源：shutterstock)

news.Title: Jim Cramer on Silicon Motion: “You Buy Some, and Then You Wait for a Pullback”
news.Content: Silicon Motion Technology Corporation (NASDAQ: SIMO ) was among Jim Cramer’s Mad Money stock calls as he urged investors to exercise caution when it comes to red-hot AI stocks . When a caller asked about the stock, Cramer stated: That is called SIMO… And we like SIMO. I know it’s ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Jim Cramer recommends buying Silicon Motion (SIMO) but suggests waiting for a pullback due to its recent significant price appreciation.
• Silicon Motion develops and markets NAND flash controllers and specialized storage solutions for computing, enterprise data centers, and mobile devices.
• The company has transitioned towards higher-margin, leading-edge applications driven by hyperscaler demands, moving away from lower-margin consumer electronics.
• Heartland Advisors believes SIMO remains undervalued, with a price target of $185 compared to its current trading price of $117, factoring in an anticipated $160 million cash settlement from an arbitration case.
news.Keywords: stock recommendation, NAND flash controllers, data center storage, hyperscaler demand, undervaluation
